title: Nuby Animal Adventures Activity Spiral – Interactive Pram Toy with Sensory Toys Suitable from Birth, 89075, One Size
features: SPIRAL PRAM TOY – Your little explorer will love our Animal Adventures Activity Spiral, the perfect pram accessory.
SENSORY TOYS - The soft padded spiral has a variety of sensory elements, including a squeaking koala, rattling parrot, and a transparent ring.
MULTIFUNCTIONAL - Wrap the soft spiral around your little one’s pram bars or car seat handle for endless entertainment on the go.
IMPROVES MOTOR SKILLS – The different shapes and sounds have been designed to be great for encouraging sensory play and improving motor skills.
ANIMAL ADVENTURES COLLECTION – This baby pram toy is part of our Animal Adventures collection; related items are available in our Store.
description: From the manufacturer Super Soft Super soft plush toys suitable from birth. Wrap Around Spiral Attach the spiral to your baby's pram or car seat for fun on the go. Hanging Toys 3 hanging sensory toys for your little one to reach for and play.
